title: AN ACT TO FURTHER AMEND SECTION NINE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-TWO HUNDRED SIXTY, AS AMENDED.

chunks.text:
S. No. 873 / 62 OG No. 33, 5900 (August 15, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4380, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT TO FURTHER AMEND SECTION NINE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-TWO HUNDRED SIXTY, AS AMENDED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section nine of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-two hundred and sixty as amended by Republic Act Numbered Thirty-six hundred and severity-five is hereby further amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 9.

Wage and Position Classification Office.

â The Wage and Position Classification Office shall be responsible for the classification of positions in the civil service and shall standardize the salaries of the group or groups of positions to be classified: Provided, That the range of minimum and maximum salaries allowable for civil service eligibilities shall be:

Eligibilities

Minimum

Maximum

First Grade........................

P3,000

No limit

Second Grade.................

2,400

P7,200

Third Grade......................

2,160

4,800

Senior Stenographer.........

3,000

No limit

Junior Stenographer.........

2,160

7,200

Senior Typist.....................

3,000

6,720

Junior Typist ...................

2,160

5,040"

SEC. 2. All Acts, executive orders, administrative orders, rules and regulations, or parts thereof inconsistent with the provisions of this Act are hereby repealed.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
